name: Untold Mystery: Angel's Cry 2 - Tears of the Fallen
short_description: Enter the shoes of a Vatican secret agent in this story-rich, hidden-object puzzle adventure set in a terror-stricken medieval Spanish village.
detailed_description:
Inquisitor Augustine has lost his mind, plunging Portonero into fear. You must step in, investigate suspicious villagers, uncover the truth behind the chaos and end the reign of terror.

Investigate the obsessive inquisitor Augustine, discover hidden clues in Portonero, and solve hundreds of puzzles to bring peace back to the terrified villagers.

- BONUS CHAPTER "Mark My Words!"

- re-playable MINI-GAMES

- re-playable HIDDEN OBJECT scenes

- ART BOOK and SOUNDTRACK

- complete integrated STRATEGY GUIDE

🔎 Hidden Object & Puzzle Adventure – investigate  scenes and solve mini-games.

🧩 Dozens of locations & mini-games – mystery lurks from every dark corner.

🗺️ Map & Journal – always know where to go next.

🎧 Full voiceovers & HD visuals – immerse yourself in the story.

🛠️ 3 difficulty levels – from relaxed exploration to true challenge.

📴 Play completely offline — anytime, anywhere

🔒 No data collection — your privacy is safe

🕹 Gameplay

Click / Tap to search scenes, collect clues, combine items from your inventory, and complete mini-games to progress the story. Use hints if you get stuck — but the reward is uncovering more of the mystery.

🎮 Play your way

Explore, investigate and solve the mystery in your own way: adjustable challenge: Casual, Adventure, and Challenging difficulty modes. Win Achievements & Collectibles.

🌌 Atmospheric adventure

A gripping mystery: narrative-driven gameplay with a strong detective lead.

Immersive locations: explore, seeks, search and solve puzzles.

supported_languages:
English*, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain, Dutch, Japanese, Korean, Portuguese - Portugal, Russian, Simplified Chinese, Portuguese - Brazil, Traditional Chinese
*languages with full audio support
